step2_import.notes: Module imports cleanly. UniqueSubgraphRegistry and FxPassRunner from nvidia.operator_profiler.fx also importable.

step3_backend_registration.notes: Backend found in torch._dynamo.list_backends() after module import.

step4_pytest.notes: All 4 tests passed in 4.28s. 14 deprecation warnings from torch.jit.script_method (non-blocking).

step5_smoke_test.notes: Compilation, warmup (1 iter), and capture (1 iter with NVTX) completed without ERROR. Non-fatal OOM messages from Inductor autotuner for specific oversized Triton tile configs (BLOCK_M=128, BLOCK_N=128, num_stages=4 on mm(8192x512, 512x32000)) were caught and ignored by Inductor, which fell back to smaller valid configs. Expected behavior under max_autotune=True.

opt1_bf16_dtype_promotion.evidence: test_get_model_and_input confirms model parameters are bfloat16; test_forward_pass confirms output dtype is bfloat16. Logger would emit 'applying OPT-1 (BF16 dtype promotion)' on first call.

_pass_pretranspose_weights.evidence: WARNING [_pass_pretranspose_weights] Pattern aten.t(get_attr) not found — pass not applied. This is expected if running on the pre-Inductor graph; the pass targets the post-Dynamo Inductor-lowered graph.
_pass_pretranspose_weights.notes: The pass runs on the graph Dynamo passes to the backend, which is prior to Inductor lowering. The aten.t() pattern only appears after Inductor lowers Linear ops to aten primitives. The pass degrades gracefully with no crash.

_pass_batch_logit_projection_stub.evidence: No WARNING logged for multi-mm pattern. The single-logit baseline does not have >= 2 mm nodes sharing the same weight get_attr, so the detection stub exits silently without modifying the graph. Correct behavior.
_pass_batch_logit_projection_stub.notes: Pass is intentionally a stub — no graph mutation occurs even when the pattern is detected.

opt4_max_autotune.evidence: Inductor autotuner output visible in smoke test: benchmark races between cuBLAS (bias_addmm, mm) and 19-20 Triton tile configs per GEMM. Best kernels selected for addmm(8192x2048, ...), addmm(8192x512, ...), and mm(8192x512, 512x32000). This confirms max_autotune was active during compilation.

compile_path_reason: EmbeddingProjection has no repeated layer structure. UniqueSubgraphRegistry.build_partition_equivalence_map() returned empty map. Backend logged 'no repeated layers detected — flat compile path'.
